daily.today_energy: You're giving main character energy today, Cap. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to trust your gut more than your spreadsheet. Something unexpected might just be exactly what you needed.
daily.love: Your vibe is magnetic right now. Whether you're single or coupled up, people are drawn to your authenticity. Don't play it cool—let them see the real you. That's where the magic happens.
daily.career: Mercury's got your back with creative solutions you didn't see coming. This is a great day to pitch that idea or have the conversation you've been rehearsing. Your timing feels right.
daily.health: Your body's asking for more play and less planning today. Movement that feels good—not obligatory—is calling to you. Listen to what actually energizes you instead of what you think should.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about breaking free from what no longer serves you, Capricorn. The cosmos is nudging you toward authenticity—stop playing it safe and let your weird side show. Trust the process, even when it feels uncomfortable.
weekly.love: Your heart's been guarded, but someone (or your own vibe) is asking you to soften. Whether single or coupled, vulnerability is actually your superpower right now. Let people see the real you beneath the boss energy.
weekly.career: Fresh ideas are flowing through your workspace. Don't dismiss that unconventional approach—your intuition knows something your rational mind hasn't caught up to yet. Speak up in that meeting; your perspective hits different this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for rest that actually feels good, not just efficient. Ditch the punishment-mindset workouts and lean into movement that brings joy. Mental clarity follows when you stop grinding so hard.
